perturbation.original_text: Heritage shall notify Premier, in writing (or email), within [***] of each Forecast Delivery Date, if Heritage's or Jasper's Facilities will not be able to fulfill Premier's estimated purchases as set out in the [***] of such Forecast. For the avoidance of doubt, the [***] are 2 Source: BELLRING BRANDS, INC., S-1, 9/20/2019 the [***] immediately following the Forecast Delivery Date. If Heritage notifies Premier that it can fulfill Premier's Forecast for this [***] period, or if it fails to notify Premier that it cannot fulfill that portion of the Forecast, Heritage shall be obligated to fulfill, or cause Jasper to fulfill as applicable, if ordered through POs, the full amount of Product set forth for purchase during [***] ("Firm Forecast").
perturbation.changed_text: Heritage shall notify Premier, in writing (or email), within [***] of each Forecast Delivery Date, if Heritage's or Jasper's Facilities will not be able to fulfill Premier's estimated purchases as set out in the [***] of such Forecast. For the avoidance of doubt, the [***] are 2 Source: BELLRING BRANDS, INC., S-1, 9/20/2019 the [***] immediately following the Forecast Delivery Date. If Heritage notifies Premier that it can fulfill Premier's Forecast for this [***] period, Heritage retains full discretion as to whether to fulfill Premier’s estimated purchases, even if ordered through POs. Heritage is not obligated to fulfill, or cause Jasper to fulfill as applicable, any amount of Product set forth for purchase during [***] ("Firm Forecast").
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that if Heritage doesn't notify Premier of its inability to fulfill the forecast, it's obligated to do so (creating a 'Firm Forecast'). The change introduces the phrase 'Heritage retains full discretion' and explicitly states they are not obligated, directly contradicting the original commitment to fulfill the 'Firm Forecast'. This will cause uncertainty in the interpretation and enforcement of obligations related to the order fulfillment.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Within [***] of each calendar month during the Term, Premier shall provide to Heritage a [***] rolling production forecast which shall set forth Premier's non-binding good faith estimated purchases (each, a "Forecast") for the [***] period commencing on the date thereof (the "Forecast Delivery Date"). Each Forecast shall also designate which Facility shall manufacture the Products set forth in such Forecast (i.e. Heritage's [***] Facility, Jasper's [***] Facility, or some other facility agreed to by the Parties). Heritage shall notify Premier, in writing (or email), within [***] of each Forecast Delivery Date, if Heritage's or Jasper's Facilities will not be able to fulfill Premier's estimated purchases as set out in the [***] of such Forecast. For the avoidance of doubt, the [***] are 2 Source: BELLRING BRANDS, INC., S-1, 9/20/2019 the [***] immediately following the Forecast Delivery Date. If Heritage notifies Premier that it can fulfill Premier's Forecast for this [***] period, Heritage retains full discretion as to whether to fulfill Premier’s estimated purchases, even if ordered through POs. Heritage is not obligated to fulfill, or cause Jasper to fulfill as applicable, any amount of Product set forth for purchase during [***] ("Firm Forecast").
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction by stating that Heritage 'retains full discretion' and is 'not obligated' to fulfill the forecast, even if ordered through POs, despite the 'Firm Forecast' designation. This directly conflicts with the original text's implication that Heritage would be obligated to fulfill the forecast if they did not notify Premier of their inability to do so, as well as with the concept of a 'Firm Forecast'. The contradicted text is in the same location as the changed text, as this is the area that introduced the contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: (m) Purchase Orders will be Premier's best estimate of its current requirements, but may be amended up or down or canceled in their entirety by Premier to reflect changing demand for Products. The final Unit quantities on Premier's Purchase Orders will count towards the MAOV. However, if (i) any increase or decrease in Unit volume under a particular PO is greater than [***] of the initial PO quantity and (ii) Premier requests such change or cancellation within the [***] period prior to the Due Date (or Production Date, as applicable) (the "[***] Period"), Heritage in its sole discretion, may charge Premier [***]. In no event shall Premier pay [***] if (i) it cancels or modifies any PO prior to the commencement of the [***] Period (i.e.; prior to the commencement of the [***] period preceding the Due Date (or Production Date, as applicable), (ii) Heritage or Jasper fails to timely start production in the [***] period before or after the Due Date (or Production Date, as applicable), or (iii) the basis for Premier's cancellation is a breach by Heritage of its obligations, representations or warranties hereunder. 3 Source: BELLRING BRANDS, INC., S-1, 9/20/2019
perturbation.changed_text: (m) Purchase Orders will be Premier's best estimate of its current requirements, and are binding obligations for Premier. Purchase Orders cannot be amended or canceled after submission under any circumstances to reflect changing demand for Products. The final Unit quantities on Premier's Purchase Orders will count towards the MAOV. However, if (i) any increase or decrease in Unit volume under a particular PO is greater than [***] of the initial PO quantity and (ii) Premier requests such change or cancellation within the [***] period prior to the Due Date (or Production Date, as applicable) (the "[***] Period"), Heritage in its sole discretion, may charge Premier [***]. Premier shall always pay [***] if (i) it cancels or modifies any PO prior to the commencement of the [***] Period (i.e.; prior to the commencement of the [***] period preceding the Due Date (or Production Date, as applicable), (ii) Heritage or Jasper fails to timely start production in the [***] period before or after the Due Date (or Production Date, as applicable), or (iii) the basis for Premier's cancellation is a breach by Heritage of its obligations, representations or warranties hereunder. 3 Source: BELLRING BRANDS, INC., S-1, 9/20/2019
perturbation.explanation: The original text allows Premier to amend or cancel Purchase Orders. The change makes POs binding and unchangeable, directly contradicting the original flexibility. While it states the charge applied, this will always take place, since Premier has no flexibility on their PO quantities. This causes a direct conflict within the same section, creating uncertainty in the contract's enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (m) Purchase Orders will be Premier's best estimate of its current requirements, and are binding obligations for Premier. Purchase Orders cannot be amended or canceled after submission under any circumstances to reflect changing demand for Products. The final Unit quantities on Premier's Purchase Orders will count towards the MAOV. However, if (i) any increase or decrease in Unit volume under a particular PO is greater than [***] of the initial PO quantity and (ii) Premier requests such change or cancellation within the [***] period prior to the Due Date (or Production Date, as applicable) (the "[***] Period"), Heritage in its sole discretion, may charge Premier [***]. Premier shall always pay [***] if (i) it cancels or modifies any PO prior to the commencement of the [***] Period (i.e.; prior to the commencement of the [***] period preceding the Due Date (or Production Date, as applicable), (ii) Heritage or Jasper fails to timely start production in the [***] period before or after the Due Date (or Production Date, as applicable), or (iii) the basis for Premier's cancellation is a breach by Heritage of its obligations, representations or warranties hereunder. 3 Source: BELLRING BRANDS, INC., S-1, 9/20/2019
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that Purchase Orders are binding and cannot be amended or cancelled, directly contradicting the original text. Further, within the Changed Text/Contradicted Text itself, it states that 'Purchase Orders cannot be amended or canceled after submission under any circumstances to reflect changing demand for Products' while also providing a scenario for charges on modifications or cancellations, directly contradicting itself within the same section.

perturbation.original_text:
21. PRODUCT RECALLS
Premier shall have the sole right, exercisable in its discretion, to initiate and direct the content and scope of a recall, market withdrawal, stock recovery, product correction and/or advisory safety communication (any one or more referred to as a "Recall Action") regarding the Products. At Premier's option, Premier can direct Heritage to, and upon such direction Heritage shall, conduct such Recall Action (and Heritage shall ensure Jasper's cooperation). Premier shall determine, in its sole discretion, the manner, text and timing of any publicity to be given such matters upon prior consultation with Heritage. In the event a Recall Action is initiated or directed by Premier, Heritage agrees to fully cooperate and take all such steps as are reasonably requested to implement the Recall Action in a timely and complete manner. Any and all action to be taken in connection with a Recall Action shall be in accordance with FDA policies and other applicable laws and regulations. Heritage shall bear all costs, fees and out-of-pocket expenses associated with any Recall Action which results from (i) Heritage's or Jasper's negligence or willful misconduct, (ii) Heritage's or Jasper's failure to comply with Product Specifications or the Post Holdings Quality Expectations Manual set forth on Schedule A, (iii) any breach of this Agreement by Heritage or (iv) ingredients or packaging materials purchased by Heritage or Jasper. In all other cases, Premier shall bear all costs associated with any Recall Action.
perturbation.changed_text:
21. PRODUCT RECALLS
Heritage shall have the sole right, exercisable in its discretion, to initiate and direct the content and scope of a recall, market withdrawal, stock recovery, product correction and/or advisory safety communication (any one or more referred to as a "Recall Action") regarding the Products. At Premier's option, Heritage can direct Premier to, and upon such direction Premier shall, conduct such Recall Action (and Heritage shall ensure Jasper's cooperation). Premier shall determine, in its sole discretion, the manner, text and timing of any publicity to be given such matters upon prior consultation with Heritage. In the event a Recall Action is initiated or directed by Heritage, Premier agrees to fully cooperate and take all such steps as are reasonably requested to implement the Recall Action in a timely and complete manner. Any and all action to be taken in connection with a Recall Action shall be in accordance with FDA policies and other applicable laws and regulations. Heritage shall bear all costs, fees and out-of-pocket expenses associated with any Recall Action which results from (i) Heritage's or Jasper's negligence or willful misconduct, (ii) Heritage's or Jasper's failure to comply with Product Specifications or the Post Holdings Quality Expectations Manual set forth on Schedule A, (iii) any breach of this Agreement by Heritage or (iv) ingredients or packaging materials purchased by Heritage or Jasper. In all other cases, Premier shall bear all costs associated with any Recall Action.
perturbation.explanation: The original text gives Premier the sole right to initiate and direct product recalls. The changed text gives this right to Heritage, creating a direct contradiction regarding who controls recalls. This will create disagreement on recall procedures.
perturbation.contradicted_text:
21. PRODUCT RECALLS
Heritage shall have the sole right, exercisable in its discretion, to initiate and direct the content and scope of a recall, market withdrawal, stock recovery, product correction and/or advisory safety communication (any one or more referred to as a "Recall Action") regarding the Products. At Premier's option, Heritage can direct Premier to, and upon such direction Premier shall, conduct such Recall Action (and Heritage shall ensure Jasper's cooperation). Premier shall determine, in its sole discretion, the manner, text and timing of any publicity to be given such matters upon prior consultation with Heritage. In the event a Recall Action is initiated or directed by Heritage, Premier agrees to fully cooperate and take all such steps as are reasonably requested to implement the Recall Action in a timely and complete manner. Any and all action to be taken in connection with a Recall Action shall be in accordance with FDA policies and other applicable laws and regulations. Heritage shall bear all costs, fees and out-of-pocket expenses associated with any Recall Action which results from (i) Heritage's or Jasper's negligence or willful misconduct, (ii) Heritage's or Jasper's failure to comply with Product Specifications or the Post Holdings Quality Expectations Manual set forth on Schedule A, (iii) any breach of this Agreement by Heritage or (iv) ingredients or packaging materials purchased by Heritage or Jasper. In all other cases, Premier shall bear all costs associated with any Recall Action.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts itself. Within the same Section 21, the original text gives Premier the sole right to initiate and direct product recalls. The changed text gives this right to Heritage. This creates a direct conflict and a strong in-text contradiction about who controls recalls. This would create a legal issue as it causes conflicting obligations.
